---
title: "corrcoef"
generated: true
description: "Alias for `corr` (numpy convention)."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.covariance`](../nitrix-stats-covariance.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:corrcoef -->
```python
corrcoef(*args, **kwargs) -> Num[Array, '... c c']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:corrcoef -->
Alias for `corr` (numpy convention).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:corrcoef -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `*args` | `Any` | — | `()` | — |
| `**kwargs` | `Any` | — | `{}` | — |

**Returns** `Num` — shape `...` × `c` × `c`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:corrcoef -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `c` | feature channels (channels-last) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
